subject: HAPPY BDAY! :)
body:
Jeffrey!
I wish you a peaceful year with much happiness!

I have completed a year in Dubai and am per usual struggling to keep the
boat afloat. Job hunting and pulling every string I've got. I am getting
interviews with investment banks.
Interviewers are asking why I stay when thing's been so hard for me. I'm
just not done with Dubai yet. ...plus, I don't have the financial ability to
leave anyway.

Dubai has suffered through bad days of rain and flooding, and Bush. We
survived both.

Happy birthday, I love you to death! :)

-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
body_html:
Jeffrey!
I wish you a peaceful year with much happiness!
 
I have completed a year in Dubai and am per usual struggling to keep the boat afloat. Job hunting and pulling every string I've got. I am getting interviews with investment banks.
Interviewers are asking why I stay when thing's been so hard for me. I'm just not done with Dubai yet. ...plus, I don't have the financial ability to leave anyway.
 
Dubai has suffered through bad days of rain and flooding, and Bush. We survived both.
 
Happy birthday, I love you to death! :)

--
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
